info.english_meaning: to embraceto hug to linger to enjoy to come to light to play
info.hindI_arTa: AliMgana karanA gale lagAnA KelanA ramaRa karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' ayaM SoBAyAM prasidDaH ' iti DAtukAvyavyAKyAyAm  (1.89) ' lAsayet SilpayogerTe  SlezaRe krIqane laset ' (Slo. 190) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'viyati ca vilalAsa tadvadindurvilasati candramaso na yadvadanyaH' (Bawwi0 1069) vilalAsa SuSuBe pracakASe baBAse
'kApi capalA maDuripuRA vilasati yuvatiraDikaguRA' (gIta0 7) vilasati saviBramaM cezwate SfNgAracezwAH karoti
'(Keda:) tvayi vilasati tulyaM vallaBAlokanena' (mAlatI0 38) vilasati udBavati vijfmBate
'yAtaM yacca nitambayorgurutayA mandaM vilAsAdiva' (SA0 22) vilAso viBramaH SfNgAracezwA
